name: Agentic-DPO: From Imitation to Agentic Policy Optimization on Expert Trajectories
summary: arXiv:2607.10601v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents are commonly trained from expert trajectories using supervised fine-tuning (SFT), which treats multi-turn agent beh...
description: arXiv:2607.10601v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents are commonly trained from expert trajectories using supervised fine-tuning (SFT), which treats multi-turn agent behavior as ordinary text imitation. This recipe is simple and low-cost, but it only learns to imitate the sequence of expert actions, rather than training the agent to choose the right action against pl...
author: Yixiong Chen, Alan Yuille
